summary: PR 2591 linked `src/melee/it/items/itlinkarrow.c` as a Matching object, renamed/retyped several itlinkarrow symbols and prototypes, adjusted symbol metadata for local data and literals, and made small codegen-oriented changes in `itlinkarrow.c` and `vi0501.c`. The bot report recorded matched/linked code and data gains plus one small unmatched-item regression in `vi0501`.

key_files.role: Primary item source changes: function rename, cleanup of lookup-table access, return type correction, function reordering, helper for sdata2 ordering, and matching-oriented local edits.
Header prototype updates matching recovered source signatures and renamed function symbol.
Object status changed from NonMatching to Matching for `melee/it/items/itlinkarrow.c`.
Symbol metadata updates: function rename at 0x802A81C4 and several data/sdata/sdata2 symbols changed to local labels or local objects.
Supporting codegen/data-order adjustment: added `getScale`, removed `PAD_STACK(4)`, and called helper in `un_8031D9F8`.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report regression and vi0501 .sdata2 match

what_changed.text: `itlinkarrow.c` was changed from NonMatching to Matching in `configure.py`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changed Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itlinkarrow.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itlinkarrow.c")

what_changed.text: `fn_802A81C4` was renamed to `itLinkArrow_802A81C4` in source, header, symbol metadata, and an internal comment.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itlinkarrow.c function rename and comment update

what_changed.text: `itLinkArrow_802A81C4` replaced raw table pointer arithmetic from `&it_803F6A28` with indexed access into `it_803F6A84`, and renamed locals from register/decompiler-style names to role names such as `z`, `temp`, and `lookup_table`.
`itLinkArrow_802A850C` changed from `void` to `bool` in both source and header and now returns the result of `it_8026EA20` at the shown callsite.
`it_802A83E0` and `itLinkArrow_Logic98_Clanked` were moved later in the file without visible body changes except relocation in the diff.
`itlinkarrow.c` added `static f32 sdata2_ordering(void)` returning a volatile zero, apparently as a narrow ordering/codegen tactic, but the PR has no author explanation for intent.
`vi0501.c` added `static f32 getScale()`, replaced an inline multiplication with `getScale()`, and removed `PAD_STACK(4)` from `un_8031D9F8`.
`symbols.txt` converted several itlinkarrow-adjacent global or named data symbols to local labels/objects, including local `@` labels for strings, jump tables, sdata, and sdata2 constants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt data, sdata, and sdata2 hunks

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded overall gains: matched code +1144 bytes, linked code +8904 bytes, matched data +48 bytes, linked data +336 bytes; it also listed 2 new matches and one small unmatched-item regression.

smart_moves.text: Header signatures were updated alongside source changes for the renamed function and recovered `bool` return type, avoiding a source/header mismatch.
The PR preferred typed table access through `it_803F6A84[index]` over raw pointer arithmetic from another data object address.
Function renaming was propagated through symbols, header, source, and a nearby comment.

decomp_lessons.text: When recovering a function signature, update the owning header at the same time as the implementation; this PR changed `itLinkArrow_802A850C` to return `bool` and made the header match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itlinkarrow.c bool return and return it_8026EA20

decomp_lessons.text: If a float table is known, indexed access to the real table can replace generated raw pointer arithmetic from a nearby data symbol, improving reviewability while preserving the same table-offset pattern.
Object-level matching may require coordinated metadata work in `symbols.txt`, including correcting data scope and local labels for strings, jump tables, and sdata/sdata2 constants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py object moved to Matching

naming_conventions.text: Item-specific recovered function name used `itLinkArrow_` plus address suffix: `itLinkArrow_802A81C4` replaced generic `fn_802A81C4`.
Locals in the cleaned helper used short semantic names (`ip`, `jobj`, `z`, `rand`, `temp`, `lookup_table`) instead of decompiler/register names (`var_f31`, `var_f32`, `temp_r3`).
Local data labels in symbols metadata used generated local-label style such as `@266`, `@299`, `@741`, and `...data.0` where the diff changed previous global/address-style names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Moved `itlinkarrow.c` to Matching in `configure.py` after source and symbol updates.
Introduced `sdata2_ordering` with a volatile `0.0f` return in `itlinkarrow.c`; evidence shows the tactic but does not explain why it was necessary.

Added `getScale()` in `vi0501.c` to wrap `1.4285715f * un_804D6F80`, replacing the inline expression and removing `PAD_STACK(4)`; bot report ties `vi0501` to a new `.sdata2` match but also reports a 1-byte regression in `un_8031D9F8`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: vi0501.c getScale and PAD_STACK removal
text_corpus: bot report vi0501 .sdata2 match and un_8031D9F8 regression

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Changed function order in `itlinkarrow.c`, moving `it_802A83E0` and `itLinkArrow_Logic98_Clanked`; the diff supports relocation but not a stated rationale.
Corrected symbol metadata for local data and constants rather than adding new named C globals for each literal/constant in source.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported GALE01 progress: matched code 71.51% (+0.03%, +1144 bytes), linked code 42.78% (+0.23%, +8904 bytes), matched data 41.44% (+0.00%, +48 bytes), linked data 35.06% (+0.03%, +336 bytes).
Bot listed 2 new matches: `main/melee/vi/vi0501` `.sdata2` reached 100.00% (+14 bytes) and `main/melee/it/items/itlinkarrow` `itLinkArrow_802A850C` reached 100.00% (+1 byte).
Bot listed 1 regression in an unmatched item: `main/melee/vi/vi0501` `un_8031D9F8` dropped by 1 byte from 98.83% to 98.76%.

follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that added helper functions solely to affect sdata2 ordering or literal placement.
Search for item PRs where a function changed from `void` to `bool` and the header was updated in the same PR.
Search for replacements of raw `(f32*) &data_symbol` arithmetic with indexed table access in item files.
Find PRs where `PAD_STACK` was removed after introducing a small helper function.
Review later changes to `src/melee/vi/vi0501.c` for whether the 1-byte `un_8031D9F8` regression was resolved.
Search itlinkarrow history for cleanup or removal of `sdata2_ordering`.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata and changed file counts
text_corpus: PR body empty and bot report present
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice, so author rationale and reviewer intent are not available.
Bot report provides quantitative match/link evidence and one regression, but no local objdiff details beyond the summary.

The diff supports concrete source, header, configure, and symbol changes; explanations for tactics such as `sdata2_ordering`, `getScale`, function reordering, and PAD_STACK removal are inferred only from changed code and bot output, not from explicit PR commentary.
PR is marked merged in metadata, but this intake does not independently validate build or objdiff results beyond the loaded bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Propagate recovered signatures to headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a recovered body proves a return type/signature, update the owning header in the same change; PR 2591 changed `itLinkArrow_802A850C` from `void` to `bool` in both source and header and returned the callee result.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer recovered typed table access over raw data-symbol arithmetic
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2591 replaced generated-looking `(f32*) &it_803F6A28` pointer arithmetic with `&it_803F6A84[index]` lookup-table access in `itLinkArrow_802A81C4`.

source_update_candidates.title: itlinkarrow configured as Matching in PR 2591
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-status fact for curator review; do not promote from PR intake alone without checking current source/path-fact ownership.

source_update_candidates.title: itlinkarrow symbol metadata updated in PR 2591
source_update_candidates.text: `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` renamed 0x802A81C4 from `fn_802A81C4` to `itLinkArrow_802A81C4` and changed several nearby data/sdata/sdata2 entries to local labels or local objects.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate source/path metadata fact; needs curator validation against current symbols and source.

source_update_candidates.title: Document caution for helper functions used only for sdata2 ordering
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2591 added `sdata2_ordering` returning a volatile `0.0f` and added `getScale()` in `vi0501.c`; bot output ties these files to sdata2/code progress but also reports a small `un_8031D9F8` regression. If this pattern recurs, standards may need explicit guidance that such helper/literal-order tactics require narrow objdiff and adjacent-regression evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: vi0501.c getScale and PAD_STACK removal
text_corpus: bot report vi0501 .sdata2 match and un_8031D9F8 regression
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with existing matching-tactics and data-section standards, but the PR lacks author explanation, so route only as a possible clarification candidate.

rejection_notes: Do not treat `sdata2_ordering` as an accepted general technique from this PR alone; the diff shows the helper but not the rationale or objdiff proof.
Do not claim the entire itlinkarrow translation unit's text/data is fully matched solely from the title and configure change; the bot report lists specific new matches and aggregate gains only.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale because no human review comments are present in the loaded slice.
Do not promote the `vi0501.c` helper/PAD_STACK change as unqualified cleanup because the bot report includes a small regression in `un_8031D9F8`.
